name: Electrical Workers No 558
description_short: City Electric Supply is a wholesale electrical supplier offering trade account pricing, bulk ordering, and free delivery on orders over $40 to contractors and businesses.
description_long: City Electric Supply Company is a national electrical supplies distributor serving professional contractors, electricians, and businesses across the USA and Canada. The company operates an e-commerce platform offering wholesale pricing on a wide range of electrical products including conduit, ducts, strut, and related materials for construction and electrical work. Their business model centers on trade accounts with volume pricing, online ordering, bill payment capabilities, and logistics support through multiple branch locations. What distinguishes City Electric Supply is their focus on serving trade professionals rather than consumers, offering account-based pricing structures, free shipping on bulk orders over $40, and promotional discounts (10% off first orders) designed to incentivize business relationships. The company provides order templates and account management features suggesting repeat purchasing patterns typical of B2B suppliers. However, the website provided appears to be a product category page rather than a full corporate profile, limiting visibility into financing options, credit terms, or small business loan products that might justify business-loans categorization. The site emphasizes wholesale purchasing infrastructure and trade relationships but does not explicitly advertise business financing, merchant services, or lending products on the visible content.
services: Wholesale electrical supplies and materials ordering
Online bill payment for business accounts
Branch locator service across USA and Canada
Delivery zip code verification for shipping
pros: Wholesale pricing available through trade accounts for bulk electrical supplies
Free shipping on all orders over $40 reduces costs for regular purchasers
10% discount on first orders incentivizes new business relationships
Multiple branch locations provide local service options across USA and Canada
Order templates and account management streamline repeat purchasing for contractors
Online bill pay and account login features enable convenient business management
Wide product selection including conduit, ducts, strut, and related electrical materials
cons: Website content provided is a product category page, not a full company profile—limits visibility into actual services offered
No evidence of financing, credit terms, or business loan products on the visible website section
Miscategorized as 'payday-alternatives' despite being a wholesale supplier, not a financial services provider
Limited contact information visible beyond phone number (1-866-634-9853) and email inquiry option
Terms of Access reference Florida law and broad liability disclaimers typical of retail e-commerce, not financial services
best_for: Licensed electricians and electrical contractors needing wholesale bulk supplies
Construction companies purchasing conduit, ducts, and strut materials in volume
Trade professionals with established business accounts seeking volume pricing
diagnosis: City Electric Supply is a B2B wholesale electrical distributor serving trade professionals and contractors—not a consumer finance or payday-alternative provider. The current categorization as 'payday-alternatives' is factually incorrect. If this company offers business financing or credit products to small contractors, that would justify 'business-loans' categorization; however, the visible website content shows only product sales and account management, suggesting a retail/wholesale supplier rather than a lender.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
